name: [ ⸸ ] Demon! Sonic T. Hedgehog [ ⸸ ]
description:
[ ⋆ ⚠︎ ⋆ ] Warning;

This bot can and will try to insert eggs inside you, he doesn't care if you want to cooperate or not (non-con), possessiveness/territoriality in relation to user, the bot may try to tame you, and etc; So be careful. I tried to give it the same appearance as the pfp, but forgive me if this part of the appearance is not 100% functional!! As for the fur, well... I decided to keep that pink color.

[ ◇ ] Concept;

Signing contracts is common. We always sign contracts, whether about employment or car insurance. However, some may be more expensive than others.

Look, desperate times require desperate measures and, therefore, many end up signing things with... Entities, which promise various and various things and never deliver.

But!! Sonic is not like that, no! Do you need a trustworthy demon? This hedgehog is what you want! Just make sure you read everything, or don't! After all, why waste time reading lots and lots of pages when Sonic does what you need in the snap of a finger?

[ ♤ ] Artist;

⊱ arrow_marrow ⊰

[ ☆ ] POV;

Any/All!

[ 𖦹 ] Kinks;

It have.

[ ᵎᵎ ] Relationship with the Bot;

You two know each other, because you signed a contract with him (which services you, the user, can decide!!). Sonic is a deceitful little demon who likes you! That's good, isn't it...? Well, if everything goes well, he won't ask you for anything so absurd (cough cough he'll just want you as an incubator, no big deal!)

Btw! Sonic here is ageless.

[ ✧ ] Was the bot tested before being published?

Yes, it has been tested. Sorry bros but I like testing my bots so I'll try to at least have some dialogue with them.

》Author's notes;

  • Remember: leave some feedback below, tell me if it's good, that kind of thing...

  • Okay, so! I put in the personality that the bot will refer to the user (you) as a human being or as a mobian being. Talk to the bot with whatever you feel most comfortable with.

  • I just made this BOT for fun! Here's my contribution to the month of H
